product_updates.title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
product_updates.content: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.

product_updates.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
product_updates.content: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.
